scripts.android:init: npm run build:android && cap add android
scripts.android:sync: npm run build:android && cap sync android
scripts.android:apk: npm run android:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:release: npm run android:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease && mkdir -p ../dist-apk && cp app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk ../dist-apk/rawabt_v1.1.0.apk
